name: cover-title
text: Elevating Mental Health Care Through a Human-Centered Digital Ecosystem
textPreview: Elevating Mental Health Care Through a Human-Centered Digital Ecosystem

name: cover-subtitle
text: MindBridge Global is a practical continuity-of-care model that keeps safety, privacy, and human oversight at the center.
textPreview: MindBridge Global is a practical continuity-of-care model that keeps safety, privacy, and human oversight at the center.

name: cover-topic
text: Innovations in Mental Health Care and Treatment
textPreview: Innovations in Mental Health Care and Treatment

name: why-title
text: Continuity gaps are hurting patients and exhausting mental health teams
textPreview: Continuity gaps are hurting patients and exhausting mental health teams

name: why-intro
text: The pressure is not only rising demand. It is the combination of fragmented information, delayed triage, and weak follow-up across the care journey.
textPreview: The pressure is not only rising demand. It is the combination of fragmented information, delayed triage, and weak follow-up across the ca...

name: why-card-copy-1
text: Specialist teams are stretched, leaving less time for direct patient and family care when complexity keeps increasing.
textPreview: Specialist teams are stretched, leaving less time for direct patient and family care when complexity keeps increasing.

name: why-card-title-2
text: Long waiting lists hide urgent need
textPreview: Long waiting lists hide urgent need

name: why-card-copy-2
text: Frontline teams often cannot see early warning signs quickly enough, so wait time can conceal high-risk situations.
textPreview: Frontline teams often cannot see early warning signs quickly enough, so wait time can conceal high-risk situations.

name: why-card-copy-3
text: Clinical, psychosocial, and community actions are often documented in separate places with limited shared visibility.
textPreview: Clinical, psychosocial, and community actions are often documented in separate places with limited shared visibility.

name: why-card-copy-4
text: Transitions to community care remain vulnerable when responsibilities, consent boundaries, and referral closure are unclear.
textPreview: Transitions to community care remain vulnerable when responsibilities, consent boundaries, and referral closure are unclear.

name: why-footer
text: Repeated assessments and limited psychosocial data make these gaps harder to solve at scale.
textPreview: Repeated assessments and limited psychosocial data make these gaps harder to solve at scale.

name: model-title
text: Four connected components turn fragmented services into one shared pathway
textPreview: Four connected components turn fragmented services into one shared pathway

name: model-intro
text: The design starts with affordable workflow tools, then grows into a stronger governance and interoperability model over time.
textPreview: The design starts with affordable workflow tools, then grows into a stronger governance and interoperability model over time.

name: component-copy-1
text: Structured intake captures concerns, symptoms, barriers, and support context before or at contact with services.
textPreview: Structured intake captures concerns, symptoms, barriers, and support context before or at contact with services.

name: component-copy-2
text: Decision support helps surface safety and psychosocial risk patterns under clinician review, not instead of it.
textPreview: Decision support helps surface safety and psychosocial risk patterns under clinician review, not instead of it.

name: component-copy-3
text: Psychiatrists, nurses, psychologists, social workers, and community teams coordinate through one care pathway.
textPreview: Psychiatrists, nurses, psychologists, social workers, and community teams coordinate through one care pathway.

name: component-copy-4
text: De-identified data supports dashboards, quality improvement, workforce planning, and future cross-site learning.
textPreview: De-identified data supports dashboards, quality improvement, workforce planning, and future cross-site learning.

name: roadmap-title
text: A five-phase roadmap makes the concept feasible and governable
textPreview: A five-phase roadmap makes the concept feasible and governable

name: roadmap-intro
text: The proposal does not assume a single technology launch. It moves from a pilot workflow to a safer shared platform step by step.
textPreview: The proposal does not assume a single technology launch. It moves from a pilot workflow to a safer shared platform step by step.

name: phase-copy-1
text: Pilot the core workflow with Forms, Sheets, Drive, and Apps Script inside real service operations.
textPreview: Pilot the core workflow with Forms, Sheets, Drive, and Apps Script inside real service operations.

name: phase-copy-2
text: Define common fields for symptoms, psychosocial risk, follow-up status, and referral outcomes.
textPreview: Define common fields for symptoms, psychosocial risk, follow-up status, and referral outcomes.

name: phase-copy-3
text: Add role-based access, consent visibility, minimum-necessary sharing, and audit trails.
textPreview: Add role-based access, consent visibility, minimum-necessary sharing, and audit trails.

name: phase-copy-4
text: Introduce screening support only after ethics review, local validation, and clinician escalation pathways.
textPreview: Introduce screening support only after ethics review, local validation, and clinician escalation pathways.

name: phase-copy-5
text: Expand to de-identified analytics for quality improvement, evaluation, and cross-site learning.
textPreview: Expand to de-identified analytics for quality improvement, evaluation, and cross-site learning.

name: roadmap-callout-text
text: Human safeguards travel with every phase: clinician review of high-risk flags, role-based access, visible consent, and traceable audit trails.
textPreview: Human safeguards travel with every phase: clinician review of high-risk flags, role-based access, visible consent, and traceable audit tr...

name: impact-title
text: The model is practical, measurable, and globally relevant
textPreview: The model is practical, measurable, and globally relevant

name: impact-intro
text: It begins with a low-cost pilot, but its structure already aligns with WHO priorities for governance, community care, and learning health systems.
textPreview: It begins with a low-cost pilot, but its structure already aligns with WHO priorities for governance, community care, and learning health...

name: impact-outcomes-bullets
text:
Fewer repeated assessments and earlier recognition of urgent need.
Clearer prioritization and less repetitive documentation for multidisciplinary teams.
Better follow-up completion, referral closure, and service learning from routine data.
textPreview: Fewer repeated assessments and earlier recognition of urgent need. | Clearer prioritization and less repetitive documentation for multidi...

name: impact-scale-bullets
text:
Prototype starts with Google Apps Script, Forms, Sheets, and Drive in resource-limited settings.
Later phases add RBAC, consent, audit trails, and validated AI support under professional accountability.
De-identified analytics enable cross-site learning without unnecessary exposure of sensitive records.
textPreview: Prototype starts with Google Apps Script, Forms, Sheets, and Drive in resource-limited settings. | Later phases add RBAC, consent, audit ...

name: impact-footer
text: Start local. Scale responsibly. Keep the human touch.
textPreview: Start local. Scale responsibly. Keep the human touch.
